author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Congressman Castro’s playing the classic empathy trap.  

Painting ICE as “rogue abusers” for detaining a Venezuelan family at a school bus stop. Dramatic optics, for sure, but misleading as hell…

Fact: This family entered on parole in 2021, had pending asylum claims, but no permanent legal status per DHS. ICE enforced the law. 

The system working is working here, not “tyranny.”

Local Texas cops aren’t “turned into ICE agents.” They only engage on immigration when criminal conduct brings someone into custody—standard 287(g) cooperation for public safety. 

Castro wants sanctuary rules that shield criminal violators thus eroding public trust.

Meanwhile, budgets are crushed by immigrant welfare use, education, healthcare, and housing for households without full status. 

Taxpayers foot the bill while services are taken from American citizens. That’s not compassion, and it is unsustainable.

Castro’s selective story hides the real game.  Weak enforcement creates chaos, divided communities, and forces locals to clean up the mess. Americans want laws followed, not selective laws and emotional theater. 

Enforce borders. Prioritize citizens. Accountability over anecdotes.

Rule of law isn’t abuse. It’s the foundation.

Mass deportations are the solution!

tweets.text:
Can you imagine a pro sports team deliberately recruiting players who drag the whole team down, and then wondering why they keep losing?

That’s exactly what our immigration system has been doing for years. 

Good on @RepOgles for calling it out.

Over half of the Afghan migrants we brought in are on social benefits.  More self-sabotage folks!

The fix isn’t complicated.  Stop importing problems, and start removing them. Mass deportations of those who can’t or won’t contribute or assimilate is the only logical play.

Ogles gets it. He’s not afraid to say what needs to be said. 

This is how you actually fix the country, by refusing to keep playing a losing game.

Well played, Congressman!  🇺🇸 
 https://t.co/UmQr9SCQSk

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
🚨 The Grandkid Test

In 15 years your grandchild will ask, “ Dad, why does our city feel like a different country?”

You’ll say, “Well son, Democrats like that Bass socialist watched the clock. They imported millions, then “explored” noncitizen voting in LA in hopes it would catch in other blue areas.  

First school boards. 

Then everything. 

Permanent rule through un- American demographics.

Those directing our policy seem ready and willing to lose. 

Republicans chase next quarter’s dividends and cheap labor, clearly not thinking past our next quarter, all the while handing the country to new voter blocs.

Citizenship used to mean something. Now it’s diluted for votes while both sides pretend it’s “just local.”

This isn’t policy. It’s civilizational replacement on autopilot.

One side thinks in generations.

The other thinks in stock prices.

Your grandkids get the bill.

Secure the filter. Now. Or admit you don’t care what nation they inherit.  

Mass deportations stop Bass and her ilk in their tracks!

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
🚨 The Last Exit Ramp Just Got Closed

California had one real shot at liberation, Border Patrol roving patrols hitting the streets hard.

Now? Pulled for “targeted enforcement” in favor of Tom Homan’s wisdom of just going after criminals. 

That’s capitulation. It basically surrenders California as no longer part of the USA.

This is the magnitude of the neglect, California is 28% foreign-born, highest in the nation. 

Regions already feel like another country. 

Sanctuary laws protect criminals. Noncitizen voting is being “explored.”

Democrats play the long game for permanent rule. 

Targeted enforcement is a joke. Not even close to serious.

The filter is being dismantled on purpose. 

This is civilizational replacement on autopilot.

Total spectrum immigration enforcement is the only way out. 

Mass deportations now, or admit you don’t care what nation your grandkids wake up in!!!

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Yet another perfect example of a problem that’s downstream of immigration;  housing shortages, crowded schools, disappearing open space. Fix the root, or keep treating symptoms forever.

This E.T. bike scene from the early 80s shows endless empty hills where kids had freedom to roam. 

Same spot today has wall-to-wall houses with zero open space left.

Nostalgia hits hard, but let’s be honest about what changed. 

We didn’t “need” to pave paradise for natural population growth. Our rulers flooded the country with tens of millions of ILLEGAL ALIENS through mass immigration. 

That man-made demand turned open lots into tract housing, dirt jumps into cul-de-sacs, childhood adventure into traffic and density, and drove home prices through the roof as supply struggled to keep up with the artificial population surge.

Control immigration and those hills stay empty and prices stabilize. 

Keep the floodgates open however, and every nostalgic photo becomes a before/after of lost quality of life and unaffordable homes for regular Americans.

Mass deportations are yet again, the remedy.  🇺🇸 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
Wow, doesn’t her story just draw the tears? Those big hopeful eyes.  Pure emotional catnip.

Guess the USA isn’t a country with borders and limits… it’s a bottomless pit of compassion, open for grabs.

Master manipulation move: Misty eyes and personal stories, skipping costs, housing strain, and security. 

Especially rich coming from her, a resident of Williamsburg, Brooklyn, a gentrified enclave with $1.3M–$1.85M homes and $4,700+ rents. 

Safe, wealthy hipster life for her while the rest of us absorb the poverty and overload.

Run the country on emotions? That’s how you build a compassion trap, not a sustainable system. Classic elite hypocrisy.

tweets.text:
Becerra admits it.  

As Governor, he’d give free healthcare to illegal aliens first. “Hard workers like my parents,” he says.

What he presents as compassion is , in actuality, allegiance to foreign nationals  👽 in disguise.

Governors should be risk managers for residents, not importing more 👽 s. 

CA has the highest foreign-born population due to this mindset. 

Free stuff signals “come get it,” more arrive, and costs explode. 

He denies the only logical fix:, which is mass deportations.

CA-Worst wealth gap, endless deficits, and taxpayers holding the bag as the state slides into third-world decay. 

Put residents first, Becerra, not illegals aliens.

The true solution requires real strength , and it’s not the easy path.  

Mass deportations!! 🇺🇸.

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Import the Third World, import its values…

At sacred Cathedral Rock in Sedona, Indian men were caught chiseling away like it was just another wall back home. Not hate, not vandalism, simple habit.

Cultures bring default settings. Some preserve beauty. Others consume it.

We still have wild spaces worth saving. 

Stop the inflow. Assimilate or deport. Before America’s wonders get carved up like the places they left.

Aliens don’t have the conservation mindset of Americans.  

Where are the environmentalists?  

Mass deportations solve these problems now!!!!

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Pattern recognition time: 

Republicans could lock in midterm wins the easy way — by embracing Steve Cortes’ simple message. Deport every illegal. Slash legal immigration to a trickle. 

Supply and demand fixes wages, and it protects the wild spaces and values we’re importing away.

Instead, they fumble basics like the SAVE Act and do… nothing.

Are they playing to lose? 

Or just stuck in old defaults?

Time to primary the RINOs and elect winners who get it. 

Supporting mass deportations isn’t radical — it’s obvious pattern recognition. 

Winners see the system and act. 

It’s actually very easy to win if you choose to.

tweets.text:
Pattern recognition again folks!  

Protesters blocking ICE vehicles in Newark are the same flavor that shut down roving patrols and slowed mass deportations in Minneapolis.

What most people don’t know? 

The Mean Green Team put those same protests down hard in Los Angeles and Chicago.

Internal guts are a choice. 

These activists have zero chance once real enforcement is fully unleashed.

Those guiding administration’s move are obvious at this point.  

Ignore the noise, back the operators, and deliver the mandate. 

Winners choose enforcement over theater.

tweets.text:
Illegal aliens are now using hidden cameras and GPS trackers to spy on California families before breaking into their homes.

This isn’t random crime. This is sophisticated, organized burglary rings operating with zero fear.

They’re here and laughing at us because they know we’re not serious about addressing them. 

Mass deportations would change that overnight.  Once word spreads that enforcement is real, many would self-deport before we ever knock on their door.

That’s how you clean up neighborhoods…….fast💨
